steps.title: Write the dimensions
steps.content: Let $w$ be the width of the patio. The length is $7$ feet longer, so the length is $w+7$.

steps.title: Find the positive width
steps.content:
Factor the quadratic:
$$(w+15)(w-8)=0$$
The positive width is $8$, so the length is
$$8+7=15$$
The answer is 15.
